prediction.reasoning: For a 22-day horizon on ADI stock, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with estimated daily volatility of ~2.5% based on semiconductor sector characteristics. The point estimate assumes no drift (random walk). Confidence intervals widen with higher confidence levels, reflecting increased uncertainty over the 22-day period. ADI as a semiconductor stock typically exhibits moderate to high volatility, justifying the ~15% range at 90% confidence.
